module.name: PySide6
module.reason: Included to allow post load workaround code.

module.name: PySide6-postLoad
module.reason: According to Yaml 'post-import-code' configuration.

module.name: PySide6-preLoad
module.reason: Adding binary folder to runtime 'PATH' environment variable for proper Qt loading.

module.name: PySide6.QtCore
module.reason: Extension module needed for standalone mode.

module.name: PySide6.QtCore-postLoad
module.reason: Setting Qt library path to distribution folder. We need to avoid loading target system Qt plugins, which may be from another Qt version.
